text: Agar main aapse ek Jhooth 100 bar kahun to Mumkin hai aap use per yakin Kabhi Na Karen
lekin Agar Vahi Jhooth
alag alag Logon Se Alag Alag Jagah per Bar Bar sunane ko Mile
To Dhire Dhire Hamara dimag use Sach manne lagta hai
aur sabse dilchasp baten Hai
yah intelligence ki Kami Nahin
bus Insan hone Ki fitrat Hai
Hamara dimag
Har use baat ki jaanch nahin karta
vah shortcuts leta hai
Jo Baat jitne Jyada Jaane pahchane Lagti Hai
Ham use per utani hi aasani se yakin kar lete hain
isliye kabhi-kabhi Ek Bar Suna Hua Sach
100 bar dohra ke jor se Har Jata Hai
ISI Tarah failti Hai
fek news
aur kabhi-kabhi Hamare apni beliefs bhi
ISI Tarah Ban Jaate Hain
isliye
Agali bar Jab Bhi Koi baat aapko bilkul sahi Lage
to sirf yah mat sochiye
ki kya Maine pahli bar Suna Hai
balki Ek Aur Sawal puchiye
kya Maine is Baat Ko Kabhi verify Bhi Kiya?
